'''dhavada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibalizumab|ibalizumab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibalizumab|ibalizumab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhavada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhævædæth|dhævædæth]] || [[word:dhævædæj|dhævædæj]] || [[word:dhævædæsh|dhævædæsh]] || [[word:dhævædæ|dhævædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavavadath|dhavavadath]] || [[word:dhavavadaj|dhavavadaj]] || [[word:dhavavadash|dhavavadash]] || [[word:dhavavada|dhavavada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavadath|dhavadath]] || [[word:dhavadaj|dhavadaj]] || [[word:dhavadash|dhavadash]] || [[word:dhavada|dhavada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavafdath|dhavafdath]] || [[word:dhavafdaj|dhavafdaj]] || [[word:dhavafdash|dhavafdash]] || [[word:dhavafdaf|dhavafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhavadatha|dhavadatha]] || [[word:dhavadaja|dhavadaja]] || [[word:dhavadasha|dhavadasha]] || [[word:dhavadaka|dhavadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhavadath|dhavadath]] || [[word:dhavadaj|dhavadaj]] || [[word:dhavadash|dhavadash]] || [[word:dhavada|dhavada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhavadathal|dhavadathal]] || [[word:dhavadajal|dhavadajal]] || [[word:dhavadashal|dhavadashal]] || [[word:dhavadakal|dhavadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhavadathatha|dhavadathatha]] || [[word:dhavadajaja|dhavadajaja]] || [[word:dhavadashasha|dhavadashasha]] || [[word:dhavadaka|dhavadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhavadathan|dhavadathan]] || [[word:dhavadajan|dhavadajan]] || [[word:dhavadashan|dhavadashan]] || [[word:dhavadakan|dhavadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhavadathaoro|dhavadathaoro]] || [[word:dhavadajaoro|dhavadajaoro]] || [[word:dhavadashaoro|dhavadashaoro]] || [[word:dhavadakaoro|dhavadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
